tagline: Gaslight everyone into thinking you use AI for texts.
subtitle: Type :shrug: → ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ anywhere. Text expansion, 300+ symbols, and per-app control.
how_step1_desc: Create triggers like :shrug:, :arrow:, :tm:. Set expansion text for each.
how_step2_desc: :shrug: becomes ¯\_(ツ)_/¯ instantly. Works in any app, any field.
how_step3_desc: 300+ symbols in the tray popup. Click → copied to clipboard.
feat_instant_desc: No dock icon. No window juggling. Click, grab, gone.
feat_symbols_desc: Typography • Arrows • Math • Currency • Greek • Stars • Sub/Super • Box Drawing • Latin • Keys
feat_custom_desc: Add categories, drag to reorder, toss in your own symbols.
feat_expand_desc: Type a trigger — get the expansion. Define your own shortcuts, use them system-wide in any app.
who_devs_desc: :arrow: → →, :neq: → ≠ in comments and docs. Plus ⌘ ⌥ ⇧ and box-drawing for ASCII art.
who_designers_desc: :copy: → ©, :reg: → ®, :tm: → ™ — straight into Figma mockups, no lookup needed.
who_academics_desc: :alpha: → α, :sum: → ∑, :sqrt: → √ — Greek and math without LaTeX.
extra_lang_desc: EN · RU · ES · JA — full interface.
extra_private_desc: No accounts. No cloud. No tracking.
extra_login_desc: Launches silently at startup. Always ready.
extra_perapp_desc: Toggle expansion and hints for individual apps.
support_desc: Free and open source. If it saves you even one google search — consider buying me a coffee.
privacy_short: Hot Symbols collects nothing. Zero. Nada.
privacy_no_data_desc: Hot Symbols does not collect, store, process, or transmit any personal data or usage information. The app runs entirely on your device.
privacy_no_analytics_desc: There are no analytics, telemetry, crash reporters, or tracking of any kind. We don't know how many users we have, and we like it that way.
privacy_no_network_desc: The app works completely offline. It never connects to the internet. No APIs, no servers, no cloud sync, no update pings.
privacy_no_accounts_desc: No sign-ups, no logins, no email addresses. You download it, you use it. That's it.
privacy_local_desc: Your preferences (theme, language, custom categories) are stored locally on your machine. They never leave your device.
privacy_third_desc: There are none. No SDKs, no embedded services, no third-party code that phones home.
